title: FITNESS PERSONAL TRAINER
description:
🚀 Join FITLUC as a Fitness Personal Trainer!

Are you passionate about fitness, people, and making a real impact?
FITLUC is growing fast, and we’re looking for enthusiastic, self-motivated Fitness Trainers to grow with us during this exciting expansion phase.


Company Overview 

  • At FITLUC, we specialise in Personal Training and Fitness Experiences. We have 2 PT exclusive private gyms located in Central Singapore at📍Keong Saik and📍Boat Quay! We have worked with clients aged 13 – 84, from Celebrities like Desmond Tan, Hazelle Teo, Glenn Yong and Royce Lee to CEOs, working professionals and homemakers, with goals ranging from fat loss, weight loss, muscle gain to athletic performance and elderly training. We are also honoured to be recognized as one of the Top 12 Best PT in Singapore and also featured on Mothership, The Straits Times, Channel 8, YES 93.3FM, Honeycombers, Expat Living and more! FITLUC Trainers are all certified Personal Trainers with proven client results so you are definitely in good hands and we are confident you will definitely see the value of our training. You can check out our client testimonials on our website at https://www.fitluc.com 😁

As a Fitness Trainer at FITLUC, you won’t just be training clients — you’ll be shaping experiences, changing lives, and building the future of fitness with a supportive, driven team.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Design and deliver customised training programmes for Personal Training (PT) clients — both in-gym and via video calls

  • Coach, motivate, and guide clients through their fitness journeys

  • Manage client enquiries and promote PT packages

  • Support fitness content creation for social media, blogs, and our website

  • Collaborate with a dynamic team of trainers to execute fitness bootcamps, events, and unique fitness experiences

  • Assist with ad-hoc tasks as required to support operational needs and business growth

What We’re Looking For

  • Personal Training / Fitness coaching experience is a plus, but not required — we welcome entry-level trainers who are eager and open to learn

  • Currently pursuing or graduated in a relevant field (e.g. Sports Science, Sports Coaching, Physiotherapy, etc.)

  • Personal Training certification preferred — or willingness to get certified

  • Strong foundation in Fitness Training & Programming, Gym Equipment & Bodyweight exercises, Nutrition & Diet Principles

  • Confident communicator with good written and spoken English

  • Genuine passion for inspiring, motivating and helping people on their fitness journeys

  • Social media savvy and comfortable being on or behind content

  • Basic working knowledge of Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, and Excel

  • Able to work independently and thrive in a team environment

  • Demonstrated leadership or achievement in sports or fitness activities is a bonus

  • Able to start work within short notice

Why Join FITLUC?

  • Hands-on mentorship & guidance to accelerate your growth

  • Clear career progression path with performance incentives

  • Complimentary gym access at both FITLUC outlets

  • Hybrid work setup — central MRT-accessible locations + work from home

  • Flexible work arrangements

  • Medical benefits

  • Performance bonuses

  • Be part of a passionate team that actually supports each other 🙌

postedCompany.description: At FITLUC, we specialise in Personal Training and Fitness Experiences based in our 3-storey PT exclusive gym at Outram Park. We have worked with clients aged 13 – 84, from Celebrities like Felicia Chin, Tay Ping Hui, Maxi, Lee Teng, Hazelle Teo to CEOs, working professionals and homemakers, with goals ranging from fat loss, weight loss, muscle gain to athletic performance and elderly training. We are also honoured to be recognized as one of the Top 12 Best PT in Singapore and also featured on Mothership, The Straits Times, Channel 8, YES 93.3FM, Honeycombers, Yahoo News and more!  FITLUC Trainers are all certified Personal Trainers with proven client results so you are definitely in good hands and we are confident you will definitely see the value of our training.   You can check out our client testimonials on our website at https://www.fitluc.com 😁
